title: Nickly Optimized
description: This is a modpack like OptiFine, but much better and faster. 1.8.9, 1.16.5-1.21.x, 26.1.2 release!
body:
#
[![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/009eb17541efb09161edb517134973e4edd27ec2_0.webp)](modrinth.com/frog)

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e641688f3a246016a9ea56ed1feb269d64273936.png)](https://discord.gg/DxsxVhyahd) [![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6b1b9b2da77f5b08e4b2cd03a23f74dc67d164e.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nicklyoptimized)

# Main information
This modpack was created for people who need a bit of useful mods with better optimization and OF parity. As OptiFine, but much better and faster.
# What about FPS?
Some modpacks were tested on 1.21.10, there are results:
- Additive: 865 FPS
- Fabulously Optimized: 967 FPS
- _Optimization_: 992 FPS (better than SO, probably)
- Simply Optimized: 1029 FPS
- **Nickly Optimized**: 1070 FPS
# How can i install/configure Nickly Optimized?
Check the wiki: https://nicklyoptimized.gitbook.io/nickly-optimized/
# Credits
I would like to thank:
- [wicivo](https://modrinth.com/user/wicivo) for some configs from [Optimization](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimizationn)
